introSection: Centi-SPEED is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Alabama Adventure in Bessemer, Alabama, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The attraction debuted at Gillian's Wonderland Pier in 2005 as Wacky Worm. It was situated in the spot previously occupied by City Jet. It closed in 2010 and was sent to Gillian's FunLand, where it operated from 2011 until the closure of the park in 2013. It reopened at Alabama Adventure in 2014 under the new name Centi-SPEED.

fullText:
Centi-SPEED is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Alabama Adventure in Bessemer, Alabama, USA.

The attraction debuted at Gillian's Wonderland Pier in 2005 as Wacky Worm. It was situated in the spot previously occupied by City Jet. It closed in 2010 and was sent to Gillian's FunLand, where it operated from 2011 until the closure of the park in 2013. It reopened at Alabama Adventure in 2014 under the new name Centi-SPEED.
